source_intake_record.raw_question_text: One technique for operating a steam turbine in part load power output is to throttle the steam to a lower pressure before it enters the turbine. The steamline conditions are 2 MPa, 400\circ\text{C}, and the turbine exhaust pressure is fixed at 10 kPa. Assuming the expansion inside the turbine is reversible and adiabatic, determine the specific turbine work (part-load) if it is throttled to 500 kPa.
